top_signals.title: Gold Steadies After Israel and Iran Agree to End Missile Strikes
top_signals.summary: Gold was steady after Israel and Iran agreed to end attacks that had jeopardized talks to end the war in the Middle East.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang declines Senate testimony on AI, China and exports
top_signals.summary: Sen. Elizabeth Warren said Nvidia’s CEO should answer questions publicly as lawmakers scrutinize AI chip sales to China and export controls.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Leveraged ETF Goes Haywire in Korea With Wrong-Way 40% Moves
top_signals.summary: A leveraged exchange-traded fund tracking SK Hynix Inc. deviated sharply from the underlying stock’s move for a second day, underscoring the risk of investing in such products that have attracted strong retail interest.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Acres Engineering boosts UK industry with prestigious King’s Award win
top_signals.summary: Derbyshire, Acres Engineering Ltd is a specialist British manufacturer delivering high-value precision-engineered and fabricated solutions to sectors including automotive, aerospace, defence, energy, rail, and critical infrastructure. Combining traditional engineering craftsmanship with advanced manufacturing capability, Acres provides bespoke fabrication, systems integration, production support equipment, and turnkey engineered solutions for leading OEMs and Tier 1 manufacturers across [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
